# DojoGenesis Plugins

> 99 first-party methodology skills across 10 behavioral plugins — strategic thinking, spec-driven development, system health, wisdom garden, and more.

## What this is

The canonical first-party skill collection for the Dojo Genesis platform. Each plugin is a directory containing skills in SKILL.md format with YAML frontmatter that defines metadata, trigger conditions, and usage guidance. Skills are active cognitive scaffolds — structured methodologies that guide AI agents through complex decisions, not passive documentation. The collection is quality-gated and designed to work with the Dojo MCP Server and Claude Code.

## Plugins (10)

- **agent-orchestration** — Multi-agent coordination patterns, parallel dispatch, delegation playbooks
- **continuous-learning** — Research modes, project exploration, synthesis, retrospectives, era architecture
- **skill-forge** — Skill creation, maintenance, batch normalization, community skill scanning
- **specification-driven-development** — Spec writing, parallel tracks, frontend-from-backend, implementation prompts
- **strategic-thinking** — Strategic scout, product positioning, iterative scouting, multi-surface strategy
- **system-health** — Documentation audit, health audit, observability dashboard, repo status, budget guard
- **wisdom-garden** — Memory garden, compression ritual, seed extraction, system prompt archaeology
- **pretext-pdf** — PDF export, typography configuration for AI-generated documents
- **dojo-craft** — Practitioner's workbench: strategic thinking, codebase intelligence, memory curation, project governance
- **bring-loop** — Gate the outward loop: one send/decision/close a day, agent stages, human executes, honest separate streams (the BringItCruz! effect; canonical: github.com/DojoGenesis/bring-loop)

## Clusters

12 behavioral clusters cross-cut the 10 plugins — skills grouped by what they
*do*, not just which plugin ships them. Every registered skill's `category:`
frontmatter is one of these 12 ids (enforced by `scripts/plugin-lint.py`).
Flags: **DUP** = near-duplicate of another member (see README's twin-skill
table for the boundary between them), **MISFILED** = the skill's function
belongs to this cluster even though its plugin doesn't, **X** = the skill's
function legitimately spans plugins.

**These flags are descriptive, not a to-do list.** A MISFILED or DUP skill is
grouped by its `category:` metadata and these tables — it is deliberately NOT
physically relocated. Moving a skill to "fix" its cluster changes its invoke
name (`plugin:skill`) and breaks every caller, so cluster membership is carried
by metadata, never by directory location. (This was tried once — moving
`mcp-builder` and `supply-chain-refresh` into `skill-forge` — and reverted for
exactly this reason; they stay in `system-health`.)

- **scout-position** — strategic-thinking:strategic-scout, strategic-thinking:iterative-scouting, strategic-thinking:product-positioning, strategic-thinking:multi-surface-strategy, strategic-thinking:strategic-to-tactical-workflow, dojo-craft:scout-writer (DUP of strategic-thinking:strategic-scout)
- **specify-commission** — specification-driven-development:specification-writer, specification-driven-development:release-specification, specification-driven-development:frontend-from-backend, specification-driven-development:codebase-audit-grounding, specification-driven-development:context-ingestion, specification-driven-development:planning-with-files, specification-driven-development:pre-implementation-checklist, specification-driven-development:pre-commission-alignment, specification-driven-development:implementation-prompt, specification-driven-development:zenflow-prompt-writer, specification-driven-development:spec-constellation-to-prompt-suite, specification-driven-development:parallel-tracks, specification-driven-development:gap-audit-then-fix, continuous-learning:era-architecture (MISFILED)
- **dispatch-coordinate** — agent-orchestration:agent-dispatch-playbook, agent-orchestration:parallel-dispatch, agent-orchestration:async-agent-dispatch, agent-orchestration:audit-sweep-dispatch, agent-orchestration:maestro-orchestration, agent-orchestration:orchestration-pattern-selector, agent-orchestration:workflow-router, agent-orchestration:handoff-protocol, agent-orchestration:agent-teaching, agent-orchestration:workspace-navigation, agent-orchestration:granular-visibility, agent-orchestration:decision-propagation
- **remember-continue** — wisdom-garden:memory-garden, wisdom-garden:compression-ritual, wisdom-garden:session-compression, wisdom-garden:continuity-ledger, wisdom-garden:reflect-and-learn, wisdom-garden:session-lifecycle-automation, dojo-craft:memory-curator (DUP of wisdom-garden:memory-garden)
- **seed-lifecycle** — wisdom-garden:seed-extraction, wisdom-garden:seed-library, wisdom-garden:seed-to-skill-converter, dojo-craft:seed-curator (DUP of wisdom-garden:seed-extraction)
- **system-prompt-intel** — wisdom-garden:ingest-system-prompt, wisdom-garden:system-prompt-archaeology, wisdom-garden:analyze-agent-behavior, wisdom-garden:build-intelligence-map
- **repo-docs-health** — system-health:health-audit, system-health:documentation-audit, system-health:build-sweep, system-health:convergence-gate, system-health:claude-md-guardian, system-health:pointer-directories, system-health:repo-context-sync, system-health:semantic-clusters, system-health:repo-status, system-health:status-template, system-health:status-writing, system-health:skill-audit-upgrade (X), dojo-craft:convergence-checker (DUP of system-health:convergence-gate), dojo-craft:community-claude-md-guardian (DUP of system-health:claude-md-guardian), strategic-thinking:adversarial-reviewer (MISFILED)
- **agent-telemetry** — system-health:observability-dashboard, system-health:observability-dashboard-spec, system-health:tool-intercept-logger, system-health:agent-performance-report, system-health:budget-guard
- **learn-research** — continuous-learning:research-modes, continuous-learning:research-synthesis, continuous-learning:web-research, continuous-learning:web-research-external, continuous-learning:patient-learning-protocol, continuous-learning:retrospective, continuous-learning:debugging
- **understand-codebase** — continuous-learning:codebase-cartography, continuous-learning:tldr-code-analysis, continuous-learning:project-exploration, continuous-learning:figma-to-code (MISFILED), continuous-learning:design-system-selector (MISFILED), dojo-craft:codebase-viewer (DUP of continuous-learning:codebase-cartography — placed here, not in repo-docs-health, to match its DUP target's cluster)
- **forge** — skill-forge:skill-creation, skill-forge:process-extraction, skill-forge:skill-maintenance, skill-forge:normalize-community-skill, skill-forge:scan-community-repos, skill-forge:batch-normalize-and-package, skill-forge:file-management, skill-forge:mcp-server-builder, skill-forge:mcp-cloudflare-builder, system-health:mcp-builder (MISFILED), system-health:supply-chain-refresh (MISFILED), system-health:hooks-reference (X), wisdom-garden:voice-before-structure (X)
- **govern-publish** — dojo-craft:adr-writer, dojo-craft:project-scaffolder, pretext-pdf:pdf-export, pretext-pdf:pdf-typography, bring-loop:bring, bring-loop:bring-setup

## Skill format

Each skill lives at `plugins/{plugin-name}/skills/{skill-name}/SKILL.md` with YAML frontmatter containing:
- `name`, `description`, `version`, `quality` fields
- `triggers` — when the skill should be invoked
- `model` — recommended Claude model (sonnet/opus split)
- Full workflow steps as markdown

## How to use with LLMs

Install via the Dojo MCP Server (`DOJO_SKILLS_PATH` pointing to this repo). Use `dojo.list_skills` to browse by plugin, `dojo.search_skills` to find by keyword, and `dojo.invoke_skill` to load any skill. For Claude Code directly, install the plugins package and reference skills via `.mcp.json` configuration.

Community skills live in `plugins/community-skills/` — 597 harvested
SKILL.md files, dormant-by-design: not a registered marketplace plugin, a
supply promoted individually into the plugins above once proven.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/DojoGenesis/plugins
- MCP Server: https://github.com/DojoGenesis/mcp
- Portability guide: https://github.com/DojoGenesis/plugins/blob/main/PORTABILITY.md
